revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Expand Japanese|羽浦神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hanoura Shrine | native_name = 羽浦神社 | image = Haura-jinja (anan).jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hanoura Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|33.964836|134.629643}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|lt=Ōjin|ar|الإمبراطور أوجين|arz|الامبراطور اوجين|azb|اوجین (ایمپیراتور)|bn|সম্রাট ওজিন|cs|Ódžin|de|Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|es|Ōjin Tennō|eu|Ōjin enperadorea|fa|امپراتور اوجین|fi|Ōjin|fr|Ōjin|hr|Ōjin|id|Kaisar Ōjin|it|Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|ka|ოძინი|ko|오진 천황|nl|Ojin|pl|Ōjin|pt|Ojin|ru|Император Одзин|sh|Car Ōjin|simple|Emperor Ōjin|sl|Cesar Odžin|sv|Ojin|th|จักรพรรดิโอจิง|tl|Emperador Ōjin|tr|Ōjin (imparator)|uk|Імператор Одзін|uz|Imperator Ōjin|vi|Thiên hoàng Ōjin|yo|Emperor Ōjin|zh_min_nan|Ôzin Thian-hông|zh_yue|應神天皇|zh|应神天皇|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} }} {{nihongo|'''Hanoura Shrine'''|羽浦神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q11412524|ltq=Q11412524|qid=Q11412524|1=Co-Enshrinement}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11657514|ltq=Q11657514|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}} ** Series ordinal: 40 ** P155: {{ill|Q11486644|ltq=Q11486644|qid=Q11486644|1=Tatsushima Meoyanomikoto Shrine}} ** P155: {{ill|Unawino Shrine|lt=Unawino Shrine|qid=Q135041372|1=Unawino Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135041372|ltq=Q135041372|qid=Q135041372|1=Unawino Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135041374|ltq=Q135041374|qid=Q135041374|1=Murohimeno Shrine}} * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|ja|阿波国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}} ** Series ordinal: 42 ** P155: {{ill|Q11486644|ltq=Q11486644|qid=Q11486644|1=Tatsushima Meoyanomikoto Shrine}} ** P155: {{ill|Q135041372|ltq=Q135041372|qid=Q135041372|1=Unawino Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Unawino Shrine|lt=Unawino Shrine|qid=Q135041372|1=Unawino Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135041374|ltq=Q135041374|qid=Q135041374|1=Murohimeno Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q485583|ltq=Q485583|qid=Q485583|1=Anan, Tokushima}} * {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=Awa Province|be|Ава (правінцыя, Сікоку)|cs|Provincie Awa (Tokušima)|de|Provinz Awa (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|es|Provincia de Awa (Tokushima)|fa|ولایت آوا|fr|Province d'Awa (Tokushima)|gl|Provincia de Awa, Tokushima|id|Provinsi Awa (Tokushima)|it|Awa (provincia, Tokushima)|ja|阿波国|ko|아와국 (난카이도)|lt|Avos žemė (Tokušima)|nl|Awa (Tokushima)|pt|Província de Awa (Tokushima)|ru|Ава (Сикоку)|simple|Awa Province (Tokushima)|sk|Awa (provincia, Tokušima)|sr|Провинција Ава (Шикоку)|tr|Awa (vilayet, Tokushima)|uk|Провінція Ава (Шікоку)|zh_min_nan|Awa-kok (Nankaidô)|zh|阿波國|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} * {{ill|Q1156492|ltq=Q1156492|qid=Q1156492|1=Naka District, Tokushima}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|33.964836|134.629643}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * Haura-jinja (anan).jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q317997|ltq=Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183214 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} * 183216 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * はのうらじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7480005004520 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県阿南市羽ノ浦町中庄千田池32', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県海部郡海陽町大里', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:羽浦神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758315}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称= Hanoura Shrine |画像= [[File:Haura-jinja (anan).jpg|250px]]
Shimenawa pillar, torii, and haiden |所在地= {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Anan|Q485583|qid=Q485583|1=Anan, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Hanoura-chō Nakashō|Q28686981|qid=Q28686981|1=Hanoura-chō Nakashō}} Sendaike 32 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Honda-wake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Awaya-wake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}
{{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|lt=Amemi-yane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|qid=Q8009611}}
{{ill|lt=Kayanohime|Q8191878|qid=Q8191878|lt=Nozuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Kaya-no-hime}}
{{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane-no-Mikoto|1=Sugawara no Michizane}}
{{ill|lt=Ichikishimahime|Q11059454|qid=Q11059454|qid=Q11059454|lt=Ichikishimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Ichikishima-hime}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhayame-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|qid=Q276944}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takehaya Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}}
{{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}・former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= {{ill|lt=1890|Q7832|qid=Q7832|1=1890}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 43) |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 15|Q2919|qid=Q2919|1=October 15}} |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Hanoura Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''Hanoura Shrine''' (はうらじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hanoura-chō Nakashō|Q28686981|qid=Q28686981|1=Hanoura-chō Nakashō}}, {{ill|lt=Anan|Q485583|qid=Q485583|1=Anan, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === History === In {{ill|lt=1890|Q7832|qid=Q7832|1=1890}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 43), 23 shrines including Waya Shrine, formerly worshiped in old Nakashō village and old Miyakura village, were merged into village shrine Hachiman Shrine, and it was renamed Hanoura Shrine. In {{ill|lt=1937|Q18647|qid=Q18647|1=1937}} ({{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|qid=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 12), it was promoted to gōsha. Hachiman Shrine was visited around {{ill|lt=1586|Q6739|qid=Q6739|1=1586}} in the {{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|qid=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} era by {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Iemasa|Q1073557|qid=Q1073557|1=Hachisuka Iemasa}} for domestic peace, lasting family fortune, and safety in falconry; in {{ill|lt=1603|Q6735|qid=Q6735|1=1603}} ({{ill|lt=Keichō|Q1328185|qid=Q1328185|1=Keichō}} 8), {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Yoshishige|Q3125481|qid=Q3125481|1=Hachisuka Yoshishige}} designated it a prayer shrine of the Hachisuka family. Waya Shrine is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} and was listed in the Jinmyōchō of the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}} in the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|qid=Q329753|1=Emperor Daigo}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Honda-wake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Awaya-wake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|lt=Amemi-yane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|qid=Q8009611}} * {{ill|lt=Kayanohime|Q8191878|qid=Q8191878|lt=Nozuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Kaya-no-hime}} * {{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane-no-Mikoto|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} * {{ill|lt=Ichikishimahime|Q11059454|qid=Q11059454|qid=Q11059454|lt=Ichikishimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Ichikishima-hime}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhayame-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|qid=Q276944}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takehaya Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}} * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} === Access === * About 5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Hanoura Station|Q5649353|qid=Q5649353|1=Hanoura Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Mugi Line|Q860478|qid=Q860478|1=Mugi Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|qid=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|qid=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|qid=Q2430|1=1986}} ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://awa-jinjacho.jp/shrine/detail.html?id=221 Hanoura Shrine Tokushima Prefecture Shrine Office] {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hanoura Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hanoura Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Anan city]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Anan, Tokushima]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokushima Prefecture]]
